reviews.review_description: This game is so fun, I just love it, so enjoyable, and I'm hoping the developers are planning to keep going with it and add lots more. I was afraid it might cause motion sickness but it doesn't at all. I highly recommend.
It gives us headaches 🤢 other than that this game is awesome 😎

Nice driving with easy controls and a colorful world . 
Multiplayer would be great

developer_response.body:
Hi there! 🌟

Thank you for the fantastic 5-star review! We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying the colorful world and arcade feel of our game! 🚗🌈

We've taken note of your feedback regarding the multiplayer experience. We usually have more people in weekends, so I think your might find a perfect racing moment. 😉 Stay with us for more updates, and thanks again for being part of our driving community!

Safe travels in our vibrant world! 🛣️🎮

reviews.review_description:
It was fun for users to collide, and it was nice that the racing system was casual

최고의 캐주얼 레이싱 게임!

developer_response.body:
Hi there! Thank you so much for the fantastic 5 star review! We're absolutely thrilled to hear that you consider our game the best. We're glad you enjoyed it.

We're always striving to improve and expand our game. If you're keen on being updated or if you have any feedback, please do join us on our Discord channel at https://discord.gg/dNcv9M4AH8. We'd love to have you on board, discussing updates, sharing experiences, and simply having fun with the community.

Once again, thank you for your support and glowing feedback. Let's keep the bump going!

reviews.review_title: Really feels like you're in a bumper car
reviews.review_description:
Gameplay and review video here (remove the space before "be"):

https://youtu. be/fa2UK1oclzQ

Nice controls, physics, music and bumping! Only problem is...nobody was around to bump with 😭 perhaps bots can be added?

developer_response.body:
Hey there! Thanks a ton for the awesome review and for featuring our game in your video! We're thrilled you enjoyed the controls, physics, and music. As our game has just been launched, we're continuously working on enhancing the player experience, and your feedback is invaluable.

We're setting up a Discord channel for our game community! This will be the perfect place for players like you to share feedback, suggestions, or just chat about the game at anytime. Stay tuned for us!

Thanks again for being a part of our gaming community!

reviews.review_description: Please everyone get this game!! It’s free and it’s super fun it just needs more players.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the 5 star review! We're really glad you're enjoying the game. We completely agree, more players would enhance the experience, and we're actively working on that front. We're exploring various solutions, including introducing bots and promotional campaigns, to ensure a lively gaming environment for everyone. Your recommendation will undoubtedly help us grow our community. 

If you haven't already, consider joining our Discord channel. (https://discord.gg/dNcv9M4AH8) We share our upcoming update plans, patch notes, and sneak peeks of what's in the pipeline. It's a great way to stay in the loop and give us your feedback directly. Your support is invaluable to us. Thanks for your support and for recommending us. It means a lot! Let's keep the bump going!

reviews.review_title: A fun game to play with your friends
reviews.review_description:
It feels like I'm riding a bumper cars. Especially, the second option of Locomotion is fun to move the bumper car in detail.

I made a room for 4 people and played the game, and we had fun screaming and bumping into each other. You must play this game with your friends!!

reviews.review_title: Best game ever. Needs more player...
reviews.review_description: Its a really good game but it Just needs more players so everyone reading this, INSTAL. You will thank me later.

developer_response.body:
Hi there! Firstly, a heartfelt THANK YOU for your glowing 5 star rating and the lovely recommendation! We genuinely appreciate the love you've shown for our game.

We absolutely hear you wanting more players and we're actively working on it! We are planning some promotional events and refining our gamplay to make the game even more inviting.

If you haven't already, we'd love for you to join us on our Discord channel (https://discord.gg/dNcv9M4AH8). We share our upcoming update plans, patch notes, and sneak peeks of what's in the pipeline. It's a great way to stay in the loop and give us your feedback directly. 

Thank you once again for your kind words and support. Stay tuned for the exciting journey ahead!

reviews.review_description: It's so refreshing to be able to enjoy a bumper car that can only be enjoyed in amusement parks in VR!! I think the cute background goes really well with the game. I think it'll be so much fun to do it with my friends later!!

To sum up this game briefly, it's like Fall Guys, but with driving bumper cars instead of fall guy. The handling was quite good, making me feel like I was driving a bumper car. I even got to practice my parking skills.

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thanks for the fantastic 5 star review! Delighted that our game reminded you of those fun bumper car moments.😁

If you ever want to chat with fellow players or get some sneak peeks, hop onto our Discord channel at https://discord.gg/dNcv9M4AH8. Keep practicing those parking skills and have a blast! 🚗💥

reviews.review_description: The driving physics and everything are just GREAT! It really feels like im in a bumper car and love the bumping into the other cars. As I play along, i get used to the controls and I can freely drive the car as I want. Loved it.

developer_response.body:
Hello! Wow, thank you so much for the fantastic 5 star review! We're thrilled to hear how much you're enjoying the driving physics and the bumper car experience. It's a wonderful feeling to know our hard work in making the controls intuitive and fun has paid off.

As with our other beloved players, we’d love to keep you updated on our progress and new additions. Do check out our Discord channel (https://discord.gg/dNcv9M4AH8) if you haven’t. It's where we share our future plans and get direct feedback from our community.

Thank you once again for your lovely words. Drive safe (or not 😉) and have fun!

reviews.review_description: The game was so interesting, and it was great to be able to play this immersive VR game! The immersive physical situation from the user's point of view raised the interest of the game for me!

It is a game that embodies the immersion that can be felt in VR. I feel like I'm behind the wheel myself, as well as crash haptics! The UI and overall design are also fresh, so there is no reluctance to play. I can't believe this game is free!
It's a game where various elements come together well and it's fun! You can really feel the dynamic movement of the bumper cars. Above all, I love the adorable graphics.

developer_response.body:
Hello minha.159112! A big thank you for the lovely 5 star review! We're thrilled you enjoyed the dynamics and graphics. Your feedback fuels our passion. 

For more updates and to connect with our amazing community, do check out our Discord at https://discord.gg/dNcv9M4AH8. Here's to more dynamic bumps and adorable moments! 🎮

reviews.review_title: An incredibly fun bumper car game!
reviews.review_description:
I really enjoyed the controller-friendly gameplay and the abundance of activities to do.
It was amazingly lifelike, as if I was actually inside a bumper car!

developer_response.body:
Hi! Your review put a big smile on our faces!😊 Thanks for the amazing 5 star rating. It's great to know that our game gives you a lifelike experience. 

For more updates, chats, and a chance to share your experiences, join our Discord family at https://discord.gg/dNcv9M4AH8. Keep bumping with use and stay awesome! 🚗

reviews.review_description: The car's movement was smooth and the driving itself was very fun! In addition to driving, it also has the ability to fit objects, so I was able to have more diverse experiences. I'm looking forward to the future updates

I like bumper cars, so I was so happy that the bumper car VR racing game was released.
It's similar to the actual bumper car ride.
And the map is so cute!
But it would be nice to have a map that I can play with AI!

developer_response.body:
Hey Hyunzei! Your words warmed our hearts! ❤️ Thank you for the glowing 5 star review. It's wonderful to hear that our game brought back some bumper car memories. 

And great suggestion on the AI map! We've got plans for more features and gameplay options like you suggested. Stay tuned and be sure to join our Discord community at https://discord.gg/dNcv9M4AH8. Let's keep bumping!

reviews.review_description:
I got used to driving a car easily. The collision and throwing motions are cooool!
I’ll try it with my friend!! Perfect

reviews.review_title: Can't wait for the full version!!!
reviews.review_description: I'm loving this game so far! The environments, feel of the car, the sound of bumping into one another at full speed! Don't forget about the ability to throw water balloons at each other! I really hope to see them add more types of courses and game types. I'm really impressed so far. I wish more people new about how fun this game is because I've noticed that I have to wait awhile for others to join multiplayer. Keep up the good work and please have a full version of the game soon!

developer_response.body:
Hi, edward!🌟

First off, a massive thank you for the 5 star review! We're over the moon to hear how much you're enjoying the game, from the environments to the exhilarating feel of the cars and, of course, those water balloon battles! 🎈🚗

Your feedback on adding more courses and game types is actually cool and we are planning and preparing on them already! And we're also working on increasing our player base so that you won't have to wait too long for multiplayer matches.

Stay tuned with us and we're just as excited as you are! And if you can, spread the word about our game😊 Thanks again for your amazing support and feedback!

reviews.review_description: It’s fun to play and hopefully more updates come where you play different modes

developer_response.body:
Hey there! We're so thrilled to see your 5 star review and that you're enjoying the game. Thank you for your kind words!

We're pleased to inform you that we actually have several exciting mode ideas lined up. Our team has passionately brainstormed, and we're confident that these additions will enrich the gameplay in the near future!

We always value player feedback and ideas. If you have suggestions for different modes or features, please feel free to share them on our Discord channel (https://discord.gg/dNcv9M4AH8). We have a dedicated section for user suggestions, and we'd love to hear what you have in mind!

Thanks again for your positive review and for being a part of our journey. The best is yet to come! 🎮🚀
